all.en: Subject: Upgrade Request — TPE to JFK Flight on March 14
all.zh: 主旨：升等申請 — 3/14 桃園至 JFK 航班

all.en: Dear Travel Desk,
all.zh: 差旅組您好,

all.en: I am writing to formally request a business class upgrade for my upcoming trip.
all.zh: 我來信正式申請即將出差行程的商務艙升等。

all.en: The flight is scheduled to depart Taipei on March 14 at 23:45.
all.zh: 該航班預定於 3 月 14 日 23:45 從台北起飛。

all.en: Total flight duration exceeds sixteen hours including the layover in Tokyo.
all.zh: 含東京轉機在內，總飛行時數超過十六小時。

all.en: I am scheduled to present at a client meeting the following morning.
all.zh: 我預定於抵達隔日上午向客戶簡報。

all.en: Adequate rest during the flight is essential to performance.
all.zh: 飛行途中充分休息對表現至關重要。

all.en: According to Section 4.2 of our travel policy, upgrades are permitted under specific conditions.
all.zh: 依據差旅政策第 4.2 條，升等於特定條件下可獲核准。

all.en: Flights exceeding fourteen hours qualify for business class consideration.
all.zh: 飛行超過十四小時之航班可考量商務艙。

all.en: I have attached the itinerary and meeting agenda for your reference.
all.zh: 已附上行程表與會議議程供您參考。

all.en: Please let me know if any additional documentation is required.
all.zh: 請告知是否需要補充任何文件。

all.en: Best regards, James Chen, Senior Account Manager
all.zh: 此致 敬意，資深客戶經理 James Chen

all.en: Reply from Travel Desk: Dear James, thank you for your request.
all.zh: 差旅組回覆：James 您好，感謝您的申請。

all.en: We have reviewed your itinerary against the current travel policy.
all.zh: 我們已依現行差旅政策審查您的行程。

all.en: The transpacific segment indeed qualifies under the long-haul clause.
all.zh: 跨太平洋航段確實符合長程條款規定。

all.en: However, business class upgrades require approval from your department head.
all.zh: 惟商務艙升等仍須取得您部門主管的核可。

all.en: Please obtain written approval from Director Lin before we proceed.
all.zh: 請先取得林總監的書面同意，我們再進行後續。

all.en: The cost difference is estimated at NT$78,000 per direction.
all.zh: 預估單程價差約為新台幣 78,000 元。

all.en: This amount will be charged to your department's travel budget.
all.zh: 此金額將自您部門的差旅預算扣除。

all.en: We can hold the current economy reservation for 48 hours.
all.zh: 我們可保留目前的經濟艙訂位 48 小時。

all.en: After that, fare classes may change and prices could rise.
all.zh: 逾時票價艙等可能變動，價格亦可能上漲。

all.en: Please respond at your earliest convenience to lock in availability.
all.zh: 請儘早回覆以鎖定艙位。

all.en: Regards, Sarah Wu, Corporate Travel Coordinator
all.zh: 此致，企業差旅協調員 Sarah Wu

all.en: Follow-up from James: I have just spoken with Director Lin in person.
all.zh: James 後續回覆：我剛已當面向林總監報告。

all.en: He approves the upgrade given the client's strategic importance.
all.zh: 考量該客戶之策略重要性，他已同意升等。

all.en: Director Lin will forward written confirmation to you by end of day.
all.zh: 林總監今日下班前會將書面確認轉寄給您。

all.en: Please proceed with booking the business class fare on Singapore Airlines.
all.zh: 請續行訂購新加坡航空商務艙票。

all.en: I prefer a window seat in the forward cabin if available.
all.zh: 若有空位，我希望選前段機艙的靠窗座位。

all.en: Please also confirm lounge access at both transit airports.
all.zh: 也請確認兩個轉機機場的貴賓室使用權。

all.en: A vegetarian meal preference should be noted in the reservation.
all.zh: 訂位中請註記素食餐點偏好。

all.en: Travel Desk reply: Director Lin's approval has been received and filed.
all.zh: 差旅組回覆：林總監之核可已收悉並建檔。

all.en: Your seat assignment is 7A, a forward window in the business cabin.
all.zh: 您的座位編號為 7A，商務艙前段靠窗位。

all.en: Lounge access is included at Taipei, Tokyo Narita, and New York JFK.
all.zh: 桃園、東京成田及紐約 JFK 機場貴賓室皆已含。

all.en: Vegetarian Asian meal has been pre-ordered for both legs.
all.zh: 兩段航班皆已預訂亞洲素食餐。

all.en: Your e-ticket number is 6182374591234 issued under Singapore Airlines.
all.zh: 您的電子機票號碼為 6182374591234，由新加坡航空開立。

all.en: Check-in opens 24 hours prior to departure online or via app.
all.zh: 起飛前 24 小時可於線上或 App 報到。

all.en: We recommend arriving at the airport three hours before departure.
all.zh: 建議您於起飛前三小時抵達機場。

all.en: A car service will pick you up from your residence at 19:30.
all.zh: 專車將於 19:30 至府上接送。

all.en: Please retain all boarding passes and receipts for reimbursement.
all.zh: 請保留所有登機證與收據以利報帳。

all.en: Final reply from James: Thank you for the prompt and thorough handling.
all.zh: James 最後回覆：感謝您迅速且周全的處理。

all.en: I appreciate the clear breakdown of policy and approval procedures.
all.zh: 感謝您清楚說明政策與核准流程。

all.en: Could you also arrange ground transport from JFK to the Manhattan hotel?
all.zh: 可否一併安排從 JFK 至曼哈頓飯店的地面交通？

all.en: The client meeting venue is on West 57th Street near the hotel.
all.zh: 客戶會議地點位於飯店附近的西 57 街。

all.en: An English-speaking driver would be preferable given the early arrival.
all.zh: 因抵達時間甚早，希望司機能講英語。

all.en: Travel Desk: A sedan from Empire Limousine has been booked for 06:15 arrival.
all.zh: 差旅組：已預訂 Empire Limousine 轎車於 06:15 抵達接送。

all.en: The driver's name is Michael and his contact number is 917-555-0142.
all.zh: 司機姓名為 Michael，聯絡電話 917-555-0142。

all.en: He will meet you at Terminal 4 arrivals near the meeting point sign.
all.zh: 他會在第四航廈入境處的會合點告示牌處等您。

all.en: Estimated travel time to the hotel is forty minutes in light traffic.
all.zh: 在交通順暢下抵達飯店預估需四十分鐘。

all.en: All charges will be billed directly to the corporate account.
all.zh: 所有費用將直接記入公司帳戶。

all.en: Please complete the post-trip expense report within seven days of return.
all.zh: 請於返國後七日內完成出差費用報告。

all.en: Attach receipts in the standard PDF format using our online portal.
all.zh: 請依標準 PDF 格式於線上系統附上收據。

all.en: Should you encounter any disruption during travel, call our 24-hour hotline.
all.zh: 出差途中如遇任何狀況，請撥打 24 小時專線。

all.en: We wish you a productive trip and a successful client meeting.
all.zh: 祝您此行順利，客戶會議圓滿成功。

all.en: All documentation has been emailed and copied to your assistant.
all.zh: 所有文件已寄送並副本給您的助理。

all.en: This concludes the upgrade request process; safe travels, James.
all.zh: 升等申請流程至此完成，祝旅途平安，James。
